title: Mockup
description: A visualization mockup for a piece. Three broad types: 'framed' (product shots with a physical frame), 'room' (in-situ room setting), 'artist-holding' (composite of the artist presenting the piece). The 'variant' field captures the specific sub-variant. The slug is the primary identifier.

pieceSlug.description: Reference to the piece this mockup visualizes.

type.description: 'framed' for product shots with a physical frame (variant captures style: black-flat, natural-wood-angled, etc.); 'room' for in-situ room setting mockups; 'artist-holding' for composites of the artist holding the piece.

imageUrl.description: Relative URL to the mockup image.

isPrimary.description: Whether this is the primary/default mockup shown for the piece.

altText.description: Accessibility alt text for the mockup image.

sortOrder.description: Display ordering within the piece's mockup gallery.
